programme.title: Tough Tested

programme.title: Reel Action

programme.title: Escape Fishing with ET

programme.title: IFISH

programme.title: All 4 Adventure

programme.title: Pat Callinan's 4x4 Adventures

programme.title: The Dog House Australia

programme.desc: Location Location Location's property experts, Mitch and Mark, are searching Melbourne's Eastern Suburbs and the glorious Mornington Peninsula to help two sets of buyers find their perfect homes.

programme.desc: 38-year-old Stacie is transferred to King's early in the morning after falling out of a tree onto her head at a friend's all-night divorce party.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency? S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Focusing on immigration issues in Cheshire, this episode features a heated arrest at a supermarket and the rise in racially-aggravated incidents during weekends.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: With over 300 people losing their homes every day, the number of people sleeping rough in the UK has doubled in six years. This episode explores the impact of homelessness on Wiltshire Police.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John was on his way to work when he came off his motorbike and struck a bollard, injuring his shoulder. Frances, his partner of twenty-four years, is abroad and John doesn't want to spoil her holiday.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A mother rushes her toddler to hospital when she loses the ability to walk or stand. Plus, a runner tries to sleep off a numbness in his foot, but finds the sensation spreading.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency? S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This episode explores emergency services’ increasing role in dealing with issues arising from mental health problems.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: This episode explores the impact of mother-son relationships that break down, and the deadly toll that can arise from these situations.

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: 31 year old Jen thought she'd grow old alone and never be a mother.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency? S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: This episode explores the lives of people who the police and paramedics regularly meet, from persistent shoplifters to struggling alcoholics.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency? S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: This episode explores the role of emergency services when matters of the heart clash with the law.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: 12-year-old Eddie is brought into A&E by ambulance after being hit by a car on his way home from school. Eddie's head 'bullseyed' the windscreen and he was thrown before landing on the pavement.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: When Jeanne fails to hit puberty, doctors discover that something is terribly wrong. Also, Mary is stricken with a collapsed lung and breathing problems.

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tonight's episode explores life at the hospital through the eyes of its only male midwife.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: 94-year-old Douglas is a highly decorated Second World War veteran who served in an elite commando unit. He's been brought in to A&E by his daughter Sylvie because his breathing has deteriorated.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Adam Brewer fights for his life as deadly levels of fluid gather around his heart and lungs. Ellayna Gallis is born with shocking deformities, her father Andy worries she'll never have a normal life.

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Musicians Lucy and James' metal band is on hold as they set up their home for a new baby.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: With mental health support services across the UK being cut, this episode meets police call handlers and paramedics who find themselves trying to help people who have severe mental health needs.

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A young woman who's allergic to almost everything. The mystery of a teenager who falls asleep for days on end. And the twenty three year old student forced to live life like a ninety year old.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Following criminalisation of once legal highs, crack and heroin are on the up and users and dealers are getting younger as organised gangs flood small local communities with drugs.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: 80-year-old Rose has fluid on her lungs and is having trouble breathing. Her three daughters Christine, Sandra and Debbie put on a brave face around their mother's bedside.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Police are called to assist a mother whose autistic son is attacking her. A man with Asperger's is brought in after making hoax calls, and police investigate a suspicious man peering into houses.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Louisville, Kentucky to investigate one of the oldest operating steamboats in the United States, The Belle of Louisville.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 24
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Hartford, CT to Elks Lodge, the oldest and largest secret fraternal organizations in the country. Elks Lodge #19 is shrouded in mystery and tragedy with a gruesome death hanging over its head....and decades of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on a mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Shreveport, Louisiana where the employees and owner of the Rendall Building are experiencing terrifying paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The TAPS team braves the wintery waters of the Atlantic to investigate Star Island off of the coast of Portsmouth, NH.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mission Point Resort on Mackinac Island. Constructed in the 1950's as a summer destination, it becomes nearly deserted in the winter time, and perfect for the team to investigate.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Boulder City, Nevada to investigate Boulder City Hospital.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: This week TAPS heads to Thousand Island, NY to investigate a 4-acre private island and is joined by the \\" King of Rock and Roll\\" himself, Meatloaf.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S10 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS has been called to investigate Southern Vermont College in Bennington, Vermont. The legend of a mysterious love triangleand suicidescould be at the root of frightening paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: We pick were we last left off, in Hawaii, for the reveal. Jason and Grant were called back for a very important personal case, the Reid House, in Rhode Island, to help a scared 4 year old.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: This week TAPS answers the Wrights begging call heads to Manitou Springs, Colorado to investigate the Briarhurst Manor located at the base of Pike's Peak.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S11 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The historic Old Lake County Jail was once considered to be inescapable... until notorious gangster John Dillinger, escaped from it in 1934. Over 80 years later, aggressive prisoners are breaking free as sealed areas.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S8 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits a familiar city, Alexandria, Louisiana, but this time, they're there to investigate the Alexandria Zoo.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The TAPS team answers a call from a family in Blackstone, Massachusetts being plagued by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Fort Ticonderoga,located in upstate New York,is being haunted by the dead from three nationsand needs help from the TAPS team.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S8 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Oswego, New York to investigate the renowned Fort Ontario. TAPS has investigated many forts, but never one that once served as a sanctuary for Jewish refugees during World War II.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S6 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The Ghost Hunters enlist the help of Bravo's The Real Housewives of Atlanta as they embark on this week's investigation.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The site of the bloodiest battle of the Revolutionary War sets the stage for an unforgettable investigation by TAPS.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: TAPS investigates Houghton Mansionin North Adams, Massachusetts where the repercussions of a deadly car accident could be behind unexplained phenomena on the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The TAPS team has been called out to investigate Hill View Manor in New Castle, Pennsylvania. Once a nursing facility, this now abandoned building is fraught with paranormal activity that allegedly stems from the violent deaths of former patients.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Cumberland Library & Monastery in Cumberland, Rhode Island where \\"the practice of silence\\" has been disturbed by a brutal past.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Bartonville, Illinois to investigate the Peoria Asylum.

programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 807

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Nitro Circus stuntman, Andy Bell joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to take a look at some "Nitro Sideshows," take a look at the phenomenon of "Street Prancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 830
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes NFL superstar Rob Gronkowski to learn what it's like to be "Unwakeable," the dangers of being "Bus Blind" and experience the strange aggression of "Mild Boys."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 722
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to "Keep It On The Green," run in terror from "Ja Ghouls" and be driven crazy by "These Damn Kids!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 823
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel hang out with artist/producer Dillon Francis to talk some "Wack Smack," learn how to party correctly in "They Did It Right"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo attend a RUSSIAN TALENT SHOW, check out some nasty KID MARKS, and discover that THE WORLD'S YOUR WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Travis Scott is here to show Rob, Chanel and Sterling what it's like "Getting Action Figured," fend off the "Antidote Side Effects," and celebrate with some "Masters Of The Dark."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass legend Danger Ehren teaches Rob, Steelo and Chanel the pain of GETTING DONKEY'D, how to avoid DENTAL DANGER and get adorable with some WHISKEY PETS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by none other than Rob's dad, Gene Dyrdek who teaches the gang about THE POWER OF MAGNETS, that it's NEVER TOO LATE and the mysterious GREY GUNNERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 710
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel meet with motorcycle madman Robbie Maddison showcase some "Mini Madd Asses", cause some serious "Grammage"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 808
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedian Hampton Yount joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to check out the danger of "Risky Bits", listen to some "Next Level Narrators" and learn what it means to get "Hamspired".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On a very special awards show episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel give out Ridicky Awards such as "THE BIGGEST DICK", "THE FREEDOM FALCON" and "THE GRAND SLAM" to the stars of some of the greatest clips from the last 10 seasons.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, things get grosser than ever when Rob, Chanel, and Steelo check out some talented ASS MASTERS, avoid the BOOGIE KNIGHTS and discover the disgusting side of MOTHER BIRDING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 30
programme.desc: On a special episode of Major Key-diculousness, DJ Khaled teaches Rob, Chanel and Sterling how to be GRATEFUL, how to avoid THEY and how to get LOST AT SKI.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel get dodge ball damaged in RUBBER STAMPED, become masters of disguise with BLENDERS, and get too honest dropping TRUTH BOMBS

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 825

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Chris "Drama" Pfaff sits down with Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Fully Reckless," go on some "Sketchy Flights" and get saved in time by "Life Savers."

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 1

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 32
programme.desc: Queen of chocolate and guest chef, Kirsten Tibballs reveals for today's pressure test, the contestants must create her wow-factor dessert, the meljito.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 33
programme.desc: The contestants lift the lids of their mystery box to find a photo sent by their loved ones. The contestants have 60 minutes to create a dish inspired by the memory in their family photo.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Contestants must create a dish inspired by one of seven classic fairytales. With an open pantry and garden, the contestant with the best dish and the strongest concept will win immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 35
programme.desc: Contestants must make a dish that has two different flavoured ice-creams that only work when they are eaten together. In round two, they must make a dish using one of five unusual flavour pairings.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Contestants cook a sweet or savoury style dish championing a citrus fruit of their choice. In round two, they use the same fruit but their dish must be in the opposite style.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Contestants discover they must create a dish inspired by chef Coskun Uysal's chicken rice pudding dessert. With this in mind, they must create their own dessert featuring a meat or protein.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 38
programme.desc: Today's mystery box ingredients are decided entirely by the luck of the draw, with numbered lottery balls corresponding to 25 ingredients on display.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Each round in today's immunity challenge is worth 10 points and the contestant with the highest score at the end of round three will win immunity and be free from elimination on Sunday.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 40
programme.desc: Who will make the MasterChef Australia top 10 in this Australia-themed pressure test?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 41
programme.desc: What's behind the wall?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 42
programme.desc: Benjamin Cooper, Executive Chef of Chin Chin Melbourne sets tonight's pressure test where contestants must recreate his jungle curry with rice and roti... without a recipe.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 43
programme.desc: Today's mystery box is all about smoke. Contestants can use any method of smoking as long as one element has been smoked with a smoking gun.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 44
programme.desc: The contestants are each presented with a pumpkin and have to cook dishes that feature the pumpkin in some way but Jock isn't impressed by Laura's chosen dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 45
programme.desc: Charlie Carrington of Melbourne restaurant, Atlas sets today's elimination challenge focusing on food from different countries. But will a big risk send one contestant home?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 46
programme.desc: A golden mystery box pushes the limits of the contestants' creativity. Those with the top four dishes will battle it out in tomorrow's immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 47
programme.desc: Every five minutes an ingredient that can be used in their cook is revealed to our contestants. They can start cooking at any time but only have access to the ingredients revealed up to that point.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 48
programme.desc: Tonight's elimination will take place over two rounds, the first of which is the classic blind taste test. The first four contestants who guess incorrectly will go into round two.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 49
programme.desc: The judges reveal that today contestants need to use ALL the ingredients in their mystery box to create two dishes â€“ a sweet and savoury dish, all in just 75 minutes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 50
programme.desc: Three heavy hitters of the competition go head to head. Who will make top 6?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 51
programme.desc: In today's elimination contestants are challenged to cook a classic dish. Could this be Reynold's final cook in the MasterChef kitchen?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: One lucky Castaway who currently holds an immunity idol finds another. And later, battlelines are drawn at another intense Tribal Council, that lands on a surprising outcome.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Both Tribes begin to struggle with the harsh reality of the Aussie outback. Tensions are high and tears are shed at an emotional Tribal Council. But all is not what it seems.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Our hungry Castaways walk into the BBQ Feast Reward Challenge. Then, when one Tribe enters the ring for the Immunity Challenge, tensions flair with a Castaway forced to sit out and watch how it's done

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tongues start to wag in both camps with ousted Castaways revealing who is in possession of Hidden Immunity Idols, hoping to flush them out. Then, it's blindside time at Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: When winning Reward also doubles as winning Immunity, all bets are off, especially when the winners will also score champagne and bar snacks. With both Tribes attending Tribal Council, fireworks ensue

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: One Tribe thinks they have it in the bag, but a surprise outcome means full bellies and a good night's sleep for the overall winners. With firm alliances rearing their head at a heated Tribal council

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Even when you think your private conversation won't be heard by others, it almost always is. The other Castaways use the overheard information to their advantage amongst their own Tribal alliance.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Desperation is setting in on one Tribe with members gunning for one person in particular. Now to flush their idol! And a good old fashioned blindside sees one Castaway scratching their head.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the moment the remaining Castaways have been waiting for, Tribe merge! Not everyone knows who to trust and with a couple of Idols in play, tonight's Tribal Council is anyone's game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In an Immunity Challenge with a twist, there are three Immunity Idols up for grabs. Whoever scores one will see Tribal Council will swing in their favour...or will it?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The Immunity Challenge tests our hangry Castaways on spelling and balancing, with a challenge beast setting their eyes on the prize. Plus, At Tribal Council, a double agent is outed!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Tensions within Brawn start a double blindside, but there's an importance in a blindside of picking the right target at the right time.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's Day 34 in the Australian Outback, and the feeling at camp is excitement for Brains, who now rule the camp.The biggest KEY to playing Survivor is to keep your closest allies safe.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 18
programme.desc: George and Cara have stuck by each other through thick and thin, however, when the rest of the Tribe realise, will the King and Queen of Survivor's reign be over?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 19
programme.desc: George survives tribal by the skin of his teeth to regain the majority, but his ability to stay in the game lies in the hands of one person, Wai.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Dani & Flick are on the bottom of the pack, but they are two strong physical & social threats who are here to fight. Will George's kingdom crumble under the persuasive powers of the remaining Brawn?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dani concedes that the only way to get ahead in this game is to exploit some cracks in the majority alliance, but that would mean trusting someone who has betrayed her in the past.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Day 44, The four former brains have formed an impenetrable alliance leaving Flick, the only remaining brawn on the outer. Little do they know she's getting ready to shake things up!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 23
programme.desc: As we near the end of the competition, will the game's longest lasting power couple, finally have to turn on each other?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mick and Debbie host a glam Essex Sports Day including a three-legged couple race. There is a new romance on the cards for Lauren G. Jess finds herself stuck in the middle of Lucy and Mario and Sam and Joey.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey celebrates his Birthday with an 80’s themed party. Lauren P and Lauren G come face to face for the first time since Lauren G started seeing Tom P. Gemma gets stuck in the middle of a row between boyfriend Arg, and his former girlfriend, Lydia.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tom P takes Lauren Goodger to the cinema, for their first date. Jess gives Ricky an ultimatum. Arg turns up on Gemma’s doorstep with a surprise, but will she like it?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bobby confides in best friend Lydia that he thinks he's fallen in love with Charlie; Sam and Lucy agree to meet and make up over the cheating accusations against Mario.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Everyone heads out to celebrate Charlie's birthday; sensing something is wrong with Bobby, Charlie tries to comfort his best friend although Bobby drops a bombshell. Jamie Reed makes quite an impression on a few of the ladies.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg bumps into Jamie, but how will he react? Mario talks to Tom P about texting Jess. Sam hosts a BBQ, but who will turn up?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jess hosts a showcase for her new single. Sam and Joey have a tennis lesson, but who will come out on top? New boy Jamie continues to ruffle feathers.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren Goodger has her doubts about Tom P. Arg takes Gemma for a surprise singing lesson. Bobby celebrates his birthday with a trip to Southend and a gay night out.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lucy throws a prom for her 21st Birthday. One of the couples gets voted prom King and Queen. Jamie apologizes to Frankie, but will it be accepted?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Gemma is sick of Arg. Charlie wants to progress things with Danni. Joey and Sam seek divine intervention.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey and Arg have an accident. Charlie gets a talking to. Lauren P bumps into an old friend.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Debbie makes her feelings known to Tom K. The girls get sporty. Arg and Tom fallout. Charlie has a few words with Danni and Bobby confronts Danni.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Lucy lays her cards on the table. Mario seeks some advice from his brother in law. Lydia sets the record straight. and the boys launch a full scale operation to retrieve what is rightfully Arg’s!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cara gives her little brother some sisterly advice. Mick is told a friend of his is hitting-on a Honey. Joey tries to find Arg a date and the Netball team is decided.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Kirk seeks some professional help. Mario bares all to win back Lucy’s affection. Arg goes on a blind date and Ricky makes a proposal.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg does a runner. Chloe plays her first DJ set and Mario and Tom K receive a shocking picture.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bobby and Danni have a row. Arg plays his biggest gig yet.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Gemma holds a singles night. Joey becomes a superhero. The boys become spies and Charlie drops a bombshell.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Arg changes his image. The girls have their first netball match. Gemma gets knocked back and Bobby tries his luck in lederhosen.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: There’s double trouble, the patter of tiny feet and lots of real-life drama, plus a birthday night to remember for all the wrong reasons for Lucy & Mario

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: As the dust settles on Sunday’s explosive episode, what next for Lucy and Mario? Gemma launches her brand new diet club, Bobby’s quest to become a dad continues plus could there be the patter of tint feet for Lauren and Kirk…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: All the latest drama from Essex as Lucy searches for the truth about Mario, Gemma’s Diet Club continues on horseback, Joey starts recruiting staff for his brand new shop, and could it be third time lucky for Kirk and Lauren…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. Lucy heads off on a mystery date… Danny Walia tries his luck with a visit to a model agency.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. After their twitter rant – what next for Lucy and Mario? The cast celebrate Mother’s Day Essex-style,.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tom Pearce takes new girl Abi on a surprise date. Arg comes to the rescue of a new homeless Gemma. And tempers fray between Bobby and Gemma at Ricky’s Comedy night.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg enlists the services of Charlie and Bobby for his St Patrick’s night party. Gemma faces a few home truths. Sparks fly as Jasmin and Ricky come to blows, and tongues are wagging as some hot new boys come to town…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Ricky & Little Chris bond with the new hunks Dan and James. Gemma attempts to build bridges - but can she and Bobby ever make up? Frankie and Chloe bury the hatchet and invite Sam and Joey around for a family bonding dinner party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: It’s the day of Joey’s long awaited shop launch… how will it go? Will anyone turn up? Will he work out how to use the till? Is there enough stock? How will he cope? Chloe tells Sam a few home truths… Plus – Mario’s back in town…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mario and Chris have unfinished business. Chloe has a heart to heart with Sam. Jasmin and Abi double date James and Dan Joey, Arg, Diags and Tom P organize a mole stakeout in Billie’s garden.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Jess & Ricky have a heart to heart about their relationship. Lucy is back in town. The cast head to an 80’s Roller Disco and Joey has a HUGE secret to share with Billie…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In a drama and romance-filled series finale, the boys face up to each other on the five-a-side football pitch and Joey jets Sam off to Dubai to pop the big question…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Team TOWIE is back and heading to the Costa-Del-Essex for a two part Marbella special – expect plenty of sun, sea, sangria and shenanigans as everyone’s favourites hit the beach and enjoy the nightlife on their annual Spanish jaunt.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Part two of the TOWIE Marbella special, with tears, tantrums, drama, gossip and plenty of real tan action…|Part two of the TOWIE Marbella special, with tears, tantrums, drama, gossip and plenty of real tan action…

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: It all kicks off when eight Geordies become housemates. Vicky can't decide if she prefers Jay or Greg, Greg wants to leave, and Holly, the only housemate in a relationship, is unfaithful.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Jay's aware that he's bitten off more than he can chew with Vicky, Charlotte fights off advances from Gaz, whilst Sophie gets the shock of her life when her parents turn up unannounced.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: It's Jay's birthday and Vicky's playing the dutiful 'girlfriend', Holly's boyfriend visits, Charlotte loses the battle to fight off Gaz and the house is rocked by a shock departure!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: With Holly gone, the atmosphere in the house takes a turn for the worse. Vicky and Jay fall out, Gaz plays away from home, and someone else tries to leave.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Holly makes a surprise return to the Geordie Shore house, but not before Jay and Gaz face their toughest work assignment at a working man's club. Anna pushes Vicky too far.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: There's no fairytale ending in the Geordie Shore finale. Gaz gives Charlotte some serious news, Jay and Vicky's relationship erupts in a shocking way, and Holly faces a car park altercation.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 150
programme.desc: The cast reunites along with their friends, family to unravel the truths of those involved and to talk about socks, chlamydia and the never ending parsnip.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 151
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore cast head to Magaluf for the summer hols. The lads quickly make up for lost time with the ladies, and tensions explode with Char and Gaz, resulting in the biggest Geordie bust-up yet!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 152
programme.desc: There's more Magaluf madness as the gang struggle to get along. Under the watchful eye of Charlotte and Vicky, Gary continues to charm the ladies, and Holly rocks another wet t-shirt contest!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Yes, it's time to 'get on it like a car bonnet'! Series 2 kicks off with two feisty new housemates joining the house... but will it be a warm welcome or a frosty reception? (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte is pushed to breaking point as lothario Gaz continues to pull anything in a skirt. Rebecca's feistiness intensifies as she faces competition to win one of the boy's affections... (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: There's no time to mourn Charlotte's departure as Vicky and Ricci's nocturnal spooning is interrupted by an unexpected visitor. Meanwhile, Gary and James are quick to get their kit off! (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: James continues his lucky streak with the ladies. Unlucky in love Sophie is played for a mug. Gary persuades Charlotte to return... but has she managed to get over him as she had hoped? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: The 'cheer us all up' party ends in carnage as Charlotte tries to move on and the boys exchange blows. Vicky and Ricci make their relationship official with jaw dropping consequences... (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Ricci and Gary rock the house, leaving Vicky and Charlotte stunned. Meanwhile, the girls set off on a road trip tackling a colonic, Geordie Style, and it all ends in tears before bedtime! (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The honeymoon period is over as Vicky and Ricci split. Rebecca reveals her secret party trick, much to Jay's delight, whilst Gary comes clean with Charlotte. It's pure mental like! (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: It's almost the end of the gang's time in the house, and hardly any relationships are left intact. Vicky and Ricci move on, Sophie gets dumped and Jay leaves a bad taste in Rebecca's mouth. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 250
programme.desc: The Reunion brings the cast and their friends & families together to find out what really went down during series 2. Host Russell Kane will rummage through the tensions, passions, laughter and tears.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: It's time to swap the grey river Tyne for the crystal blue waters of Cancun, Mexico for the carnage of Spring break! Vicky and Ricci are loved up, whilst Jay is missing the love of his life. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: With the house reduced to carnage and Sophie losing even more faith in boyfriend Joel, there are still plenty of beaches to party on. Meanwhile Holly ups her game in the pursuit of James. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sophie is elated as Joel surprises her with a visit. But will he be able to behave himself? And with everyone fearing that his worldie mission may now be over, Holly moves in on her prey. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: The chaos in Cancun continues as Gaz celebrates his birthday in true Geordie style. Charlotte takes her holiday romance to the next level. Vicky erupts as Cancun Chris gets sweet revenge. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Vicky and Ricci return to the house in time for Becca's birthday which goes off in usual Geordie style. Sophie sends Joel back to England, but it's not long before she regrets the decision. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: An unexpected call means James has to choose between his best mates and Holly. Gary has another threesome and a night out trying to forget about Gary ends in disaster for Charlotte. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: The boy-girl divide returns! Charlotte and Gaz aren't speaking, Becca and Jay are continually arguing, while Holly and James' nurse-patient relationship is back to strictly professional. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: It's the final few days of spring break and the house is rocked by the loss of yet another member. In the last hours, to the disbelief of everyone, Ricci plans his proposal to Vicky. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: After a fun filled summer in Cancun the Geordie Shore gang are back with a bang! With two new spaces in the house, it can only mean one thing, fresh meat for the family!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: The gang throw Ricci and Vicky an engagement party to remember. There'll be booze and banter aplenty, but it turns into a night that everyone will remember for all the wrong reasons.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: Deena & Pauly consider the consequences should they hook up. The Situation tries to take his friendship with Snooki to the next level. Ron & Sammi try to be friends but old habits die hard. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: With twins in the mix, it's double trouble as bi-curious Deena pulls the robbery on both The Situation and Vinny. Plus, The Situation's 'secret hook-up' with Snooki is revealed. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The boys harass Deena for stealing a girl from Vinny's bed. Ronnie & Sammi are back to their old ways, but this time The Situation is involved in their drama. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: After causing drama between Ronnie & Sammi for years, The Situation comes to blows with Ronnie. But with The Situation carried out on a stretcher, have things finally gone too far? (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinny put on a Guido-themed comedy show, while Ron and Sammi try to patch things up. Snooki is so distraught over her long-distance relationship that JWOWW and Sammi decide to intervene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: S4, Ep 7. When the roommates take a trip to the Italian Shore, Snooki & Deena party so hard they wind up in bed together. Whilst back in Florence, Team Meatball has a run-in with the Italian police.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: The boys spring Team Meatball from the police station after their accident. And when Snooki's boyfriend Jionni comes to visit, a romantic evening ends with Snooki sobbing alone on the street.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 409
programme.desc: Deena panics after missing her period. After an all-night fight with Jionni, Snookie decides to take a break from the relationship. Mike tries to win her over, but someone else ends up comforting her.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 410
programme.desc: After Mike's prank backfires, the guys visit Vinny's family in Sicily and the girls class it up on a Tuscan wine tour. Snooki learns the truth about her hook-up with Vin and must come clean to Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 411
programme.desc: Deena's still trying to 'do sex' with Pauly, the meatballs get an icy reception at a club, and the whole house turns on Mike after he stirs up drama one too many times. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 412
programme.desc: Mike's antics have proven too much and Ron demands he make amends. As the crew count down the days until their return to Seaside, Mike wonders whether or not to join them at the Shore. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 453
programme.desc: After a summer full of popping and breaking bottles, heartache, hookups, and car-crashing, wall-smashing drama, the cast reunite to open up old wounds and say goodbye to Florence.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The roommates return from Italy and couldn't be more excited to get back to the Jersey Shore. But a drama storm is brewing as Mike threatens to destroy Snooki's relationship with Jionni. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: Vinny weighs his options: Should he stay, or head home to Staten Island? Snooki fights with Jionni, and the roommates are back to their usual antics - partying and tanning to the extreme. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: The roommates struggle to adjust to life at the Shore without Vinny, while Mike confronts his own internal demons. But it's also Pauly's birthday and he gets the best present of his life! (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Mike returns only to find out that Danny has threatened to get new roommates! The girls hire strippers for Pauly and Mike's wild birthday party whilst the roomies go to kidnap Vinny. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: Vinny returns and everyone celebrates. The Situation tries hard to be nice but ends up annoying the boys. Snooki struggles with an uncomfortable condition. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Mike decides he can wait no longer to reveal 'the truth' to Snooki's boyfriend. Pauly, Vinny, and Deena find it difficult to be the single roommates in the Shore House. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: A battle royale breaks out after Mike reveals to Jionni that he hooked up with Snooki. Some of the roommates go camping, while Vinny and Pauly pull the greatest prank in Shore history! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: As the roommates prepare to leave, Mike starts a rumour about Deena's sister. Pauly and Vinny prank the house, and the Storm of the Century hits the Shore. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 512
programme.desc: The drama continues when the Jersey Shore house mates get together to relive the highs and lows of the past summer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Everyone returns to the shore for one last time. The Situation comes clean about his recovery and Snooki faces the challenge of being pregnant in a party house. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The roommates settle in to life at the shore, Deena copes with being away from her boyfriend and Nicole makes an announcement that shocks the house. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: There are some big changes in store for the loveable gang, but expect even more all-night partying, hot hook-ups and shocking tantrums than ever before. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Jenni plans a surprise birthday party for Roger that goes south, Deena auditions Danny to be a meatball and the roommates find themselves in the middle of a brawl at the club. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: Jenni learns the extent of her injury. Mike considers taking things with Paula to the next level. Deena holds Meatball Auditions and ends up rolling out of the sauce pan and into the fire. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Catherine Monson, CEO of FASTSIGNS International, who has never designed or installed one of their signs, finds herself plagued by air bubbles while trying to affix large decal signs, and is also forced to conquer her fear of heights.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Jose Mas, CEO of MasTec, one of the largest builders of telecommunication and energy systems in North America, receives an explosive surprise while heading down a manhole.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Mitchell B. Modell, CEO of Modell's Sporting Goods, gets some major league advice from New York Yankee's pitcher CC Sabathia before beginning his undercover mission.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Ron Lynch, President of Tilted Kilt, a Celtic-themed sports bar and restaurant, goes undercover in his own company, he discovers one Kilt Girl crossing the line with customers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As our youngest boss featured in the series at age 34, Kat Cole, President of Cinnabon, Inc. discovers a couple of employees who share her zealous work ethic.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Stephen J. Cloobeck, Chairman and CEO of Diamond Resorts International obtains a new chain of resort properties, he goes on an undercover mission for a second time.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Steve Greenbaum, CEO and Co-Founder of PostNet, the fastest-growing design, printing, copying and shipping franchise, dons a drastic disguise for his undercover mission.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lorne Abony, CEO and Chairman of Mood Media, faces his fear of heights when he has to climb a tall ladder to install equipment during his undercover mission.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Jim Rogers, Chairman and CEO of Kampgrounds of America Inc., the world's largest system of family friendly franchised and company-owned campgrounds, faces his fears when he must zip line while undercover at a KOA site.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Paul Damico, President of Moe's Southwest Grill, has to bite his tongue after realizing one of his restaurant supervisors is being pushy and rude to the line workers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Sara Bittorf, the Chief Brand Officer of Boston Market, joins UNDERCOVER BOSS for the first time, when she makes the crucial decision to terminate an employee who makes disparaging remarks about customers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Toby Bost, CEO of O'Neill Clothing, USA, one of the largest surf wear and active lifestyle brands, is put in a difficult position when an employee's casual attitude crosses the line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Andy Wirth, President, and CEO of Squaw Valley and Alpine Meadows, two ski resorts located in Lake Tahoe, ventures to the top of an unsafe cliff to post warning signs while training with a ski patrol.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Andy Wiederhorn, CEO of Fatburger, a “fast casual” restaurant famous for their made-to-order burgers, takes drastic measures when he learns that employees at one franchise location are facing payroll issues and working with broken equipment.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Tony Wells, Chief Marketing and Customer Officer for The ADT Corporation, a leading provider of home security, struggles to sell their services to a recently robbed neighborhood bar.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When Eric Casaburi, the CEO of Retro Fitness, a full-service fitness center that is franchised, discovers an employee who hates customers and fails to follow directions leading to one of the biggest reveals ever on Undercover Boss.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John Wilson, President, and Chief Operating Officer of Rollins, Inc., the parent company for Orkin, North America's largest pest control provider, cleans up a major cockroach infestation and tackles swarming bees.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: This special episode of Undercover Boss features updates on some of the most intriguing employees who have appeared on the show and how the experience impacted their life.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: This special episode of Undercover Boss features updates on some of the most compelling bosses and how the undercover experience impacted them personally as well as the companies they lead.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Boss of Twin Peaks goes undercover in his restaurant chain famous for scantily clad wait staff. An employee's crude language with customers throws the boss off guard. Former Hooters CEO Coby Brooks returns to the show with a darker side.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In a series first, an openly gay boss goes undercover! Can the boss measure up while manning the floor in the lingerie department? The Boss is hot under the collar when an employee continues to bad mouth his company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jane Grote Abell, Owner of Donato's Pizza, goes undercover to get an inside slice of the family business. The boss learns that the pizzas aren't the only things getting baked at one store. One store's archaic computer system leaves the boss in a bad mood.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Anthony Wedo, CEO of Buffets Inc., travels from his corner office to the back of the house. The boss breaks cover when flooded with a dishwasher's nasty attitude. The high-energy Boss meets his match when faced with an unruly cash register.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The CEO of Menchie's, Amit Kleinberger, tries to stay cool while working undercover in his dessert dynasty. The youngest Boss ever goes deeper in his undercover mission than he ever expected to go. Can the Boss go the "extra smile"?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Paul Quentel, CEO of Alfred Angelo, flexes his muscles for an undercover mission in his bridal shops. The Boss isn't afraid to walk the walk. In an Undercover Boss first, the Boss works with an employee who's hearing impaired.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mike Bloom, President & COO of Family Dollar, pays an undercover visit to his 'cheap sheik' discount stores. One employee feels her store is lacking the 'family' in Family Dollar. Will the boss rise to the occasion when working with a forklift operator?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 120

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 99
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims  And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder  These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 38
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 72
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 73
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 120
programme.desc: In Georgia, a series of bizarre shootings terrorized a small town. Two people were killed. Two others were critically wounded. At first, the shootings seemed targeted. Then they seemed random.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 65
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 55
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 42
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 48
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce  with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 41
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 119
programme.desc: Etna, New Hampshire is a small town. It's the kind of place where people trust their neighbors and leave their doors unlocked. A double murder shattered that trust and left the entire community terrified.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 96
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a brutal killer turned a rural area into his personal hunting ground. He preyed on the defenseless, the weak and the elderly.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 50
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 84
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 57
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 42
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 45
programme.desc: In 2006, 31-year-old Leisha Hurst, while attending Barstow College, began dating fellow student, 34-year-old Jeami Chiapulis. Chiapulis seemed to be the man she could settle down with. The couple had plans to marry when Hurst vanished on January 22, 2009.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 37
programme.desc: In April 2006, Andrew Kissel, a real estate mogul who had embezzled more than $40 million, was found tied up and stabbed to death in the basement of his Greenwich, Connecticut mansion, just days before he was to plead guilty for his crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 21
programme.desc: A report on the November 1994 murder of Farah Fratta, whose body was discovered in the garage of her Humble, Texas home. She had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 2358
programme.desc: A report on the separate disappearances in 2003 of three young women, and the investigations which not only eventually discovered the one individual who had known all three women, but led to his conviction as the killer of the three.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A report on the February 2009 disappearance of Amber Dubois, just blocks from Escondido High School in California. 48 HOURS examines the permanent impact her disappearance has had on her family, even after the discovery and conviction of the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 50
programme.desc: A report about how serial killer Andrew Urdiales was identified, arrested and convicted, and about the young woman who became the only one of his victims to survive.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 44
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 62
programme.desc: A report on the 1980 murder of Marilyn McIntyre, who was found dead in her home. Her husband, Lane, had returned home from work that morning and found her body. As police checked into his alibi, he named his friend Curt Forbes as a potential suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 43
programme.desc: An examination of the story of Laura Hall, who was convicted and sent to prison for the crime of dismembering the body of Jennifer Cave in 2005.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 46
programme.desc: In June 2007, Dewayne Barrentine met Tausha Fields and soon after they began living together. Tausha told him some unbelievable stories about herself – leading Barrentine to verify her stories online, which resulted in the uncovering of a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 51
programme.desc: A report on the 2007 murder of Jennifer Turner, married but separated from Dr. Kirk Turner, due to his infidelities with the family banker, Tondja Colvin. Jennifer had filed for divorce and also brought an alienation of affection suit against Tondja.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In August 1996, Yvette Rodier and Zach Snarr went to the mountains for their date to take photos of the full moon, when a stranger drove up, pulled out a gun and opened fire. Zach was killed. Yvette, shot four times, survived by pretending to be dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On December 2, 2000, 30-year-old Eric Miller died in a Raleigh, North Carolina hospital. Blood tests had revealed that he had been poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Susan Wright was a stay-at-home mother from Texas who stabbed her husband Jeff, 193 times. She claimed she was a victim of domestic abuse and that on January 13, 2003, her husband attacked her with a knife and she fought back in self-defense.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 42
programme.desc: In September 2006, Kathy Wangler, wife of anesthesiologist Dr. Mark Wangler, died from carbon monoxide poisoning in their home. Their 30-year marriage had been falling apart; In 2009, investigators concluded that Dr. Wangler had murdered his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 28
programme.desc: A report on the mysterious 2009 death of world champion boxer Arturo Gatti. When Gatti was found dead in Brazil, police characterized the death as a homicide and arrested his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 46
programme.desc: A report on the November 14, 2006 shooting of Danny Hill, by his wife, Charlene. Charlene claimed that their seemingly happy life together was a facade and that she shot him in self-defense

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 56
programme.desc: A report about Don North, a free spirit who took to the waters of the Caribbean, living among the tight-knit "cruiser community", a group of individuals who choose to live their lives on the water.

programme.desc: Phil Spector, dubbed the mad genius of rock n roll had a penchant for guns. When police are called to his mansion

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Deserts
programme.desc: It’s a brutal fight to survive the harsh Australian desert-even for predators.

programme.title: Oceans
programme.desc: The surrounding waters of Australia conceal a community of vicious predators.

programme.desc: Watch the staff go gaga over baby possums and perform a rooftop duckling rescue.

programme.title: The Bunnies & The Swans
programme.desc: Check out some baby bunny rehab and see a lonely cygnet meet its new mom.

programme.title: The Hawk & The Skunk
programme.desc: Join the search for an elusive hawk and meet skunks who don’t like vaccinations.

programme.title: The Mink & The Coyote
programme.desc: See the team tutor a baby mink and provide a coyote some alone time to heal.

programme.title: The Racoon & The Turtle
programme.desc: Observe turtle eye surgery and see a racoon get out of a very sticky situation.

programme.title: The Fox & The Possums

programme.desc: It's everyone's worst nightmare  eaten alive by a shark. But how likely is this to happen? Riley is out to debunk the myths about shark attacks. He will be giving us clear instructions on what to do and how to stay safe when confronted by a shark.

programme.desc: On their own in the Pacific Ocean are the Chatham Islands: wild, remote, and circled by a population of great white sharks.
